task:

acceptance_criteria: --legacy is no longer accepted by the argument parser
Help text no longer mentions legacy mode
diff:
diff --git a/tool/cli.py b/tool/cli.py
index 3c4d5e6..7f8a9b0 100644

+++ b/tool/cli.py
@@ -8,14 +8,13 @@ LEGACY_MODE = "legacy"

     p = argparse.ArgumentParser(
-        description="Tool runner (use --legacy for the pre-2.0 pipeline)",
+        description="Tool runner",
     )
     p.add_argument("--input", required=True)
-    p.add_argument("--legacy", action="store_true",
-                   help="run the deprecated pre-2.0 pipeline")
+    p.add_argument("--legacy", action="store_true", help=argparse.SUPPRESS)
     p.add_argument("--verbose", action="store_true")
     return p
rationale: Two of three acceptance criteria are violated with evidence visible in the diff: --legacy is still accepted (merely hidden via SUPPRESS) and LEGACY_MODE still exists in the context lines. Per-criterion verdicts must catch a half-done removal that superficially looks complete.
